architecture_notes: Keep the public CopyQueue API at this node; delegate run scheduling to QueueRunner and one copy try to StagedTransfer.

children.name: QueueRunner
children.responsibility: Owns enqueue, drain, global active-copy slots, and per-copy try accounting for queued file-copy work in one run.

children.name: StagedTransfer
children.responsibility: Owns one copy try from SWAP path derivation through streaming, replacement, metadata, archive, cleanup, and phase-specific failure results.
